examples: So far, Toyota has remained mum about its neodymium-free electric motor-generator.
The rare-earth element that other industrial countries worry about most is neodymium.
The most problematic materials may be rare-earth metals such as neodymium used in turbine gearboxes.
Under the hood, an airtight enclosure features proprietary neodymium drivers and two opposing passive bass radiators.
The neodymium soft-dome tweeters promise higher sensitivity without ear fatigue and a smaller footprint.
